titleStmt.title: SII 22.379: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 379. (A.R. No. 379 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. MĒLAIKKŌYIL ROCK-CUT TEMPLE—ON THE ROCK BEHIND THE VINĀYAKA SHRINE. TRIBH. SUNDARA PĀṆḌYADĒVA—201st YEAR

summary.p: The king is evidently Māṟavarman Sundara I (acc. A.D. 1216) as in No. 380 below. This registers a sale of 5 mā of land in the dēvadāṉa village Tirumeyyam belonging to the temple of Tiruvikrama-Chōḷīsvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Mēnmaṉainallūr in Kuṉṟiśūḻ-nāḍu by the trustees of the temple and the Ūrār of the place, for 3200 kāśu, to Periyanāchchi Duggai, a dēvaraḍīyāḻ of the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam. The proviso of the sale given at the end is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ ciri cuṉtarapāṇṭi
yatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu Etirāmāṇṭu
kuṉṟicūḻ nāṭṭu meṉmaṉai nallūr Ūrā
yicainta Ūromum Ivvūr tiruvikkiramacoḷicuramu
ṭaiyaṉāyanārkku taṇṭecuratevar Aru
ḷāl Ittirukkoyilt tāṉattommum tirunala
kkuṉṟattu tevaraṭiyāril periyanācci tukkaik
ku nāṅkaḷ kalveṭṭik kuṭutta paṭiyāvatu Iṉṉāyanār te
vatāṉam tirumeyyattu yom perunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam varu
Iṉṉilam Añcumāvum Ivvellaikku ṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭ
ṭa Innilattukku vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu koṇṭa putukkācu 3 1000 2 100
Ikkācu mūvāyirattiruṉūṟṟukkum vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟa
kkoṇṭu Ikkāṇam Iṟukkumaṭṭukku māttāl
talnellum putukkācu kiḻiṟaiyum puṉ
cai Uḷḷaṉa mattā Ikkuṭikāṭu vaṉtirā
yillai .
Digital edition of SII 22.379 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
